--- insert_on_conflict_do_nothing_on_constraint.sql
INSERT INTO foo (foo, bar) VALUES (1, 2) ON CONFLICT ON UNIQUE CONSTRAINT bar_unique DO NOTHING
--- AST
&ast.Insert{
  TableName: &ast.Path{
    Idents: []*ast.Ident{
      &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 12,
        NameEnd: 15,
        Name:    "foo",
      },
    },
  },
  Columns: []*ast.Ident{
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 17,
      NameEnd: 20,
      Name:    "foo",
    },
    &ast.Ident{
      NamePos: 22,
      NameEnd: 25,
      Name:    "bar",
    },
  },
  Input: &ast.ValuesInput{
    Values: 27,
    Rows:   []*ast.ValuesRow{
      &ast.ValuesRow{
        Lparen: 34,
        Rparen: 39,
        Exprs:  []*ast.DefaultExpr{
          &ast.DefaultExpr{
            DefaultPos: -1,
            Expr:       &ast.IntLiteral{
              ValuePos: 35,
              ValueEnd: 36,
              Base:     10,
              Value:    "1",
            },
          },
          &ast.DefaultExpr{
            DefaultPos: -1,
            Expr:       &ast.IntLiteral{
              ValuePos: 38,
              ValueEnd: 39,
              Base:     10,
              Value:    "2",
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
  OnConflict: &ast.OnConflict{
    On:             41,
    ConflictTarget: &ast.ConflictTargetOnConstraint{
      On:   53,
      Name: &ast.Ident{
        NamePos: 74,
        NameEnd: 84,
        Name:    "bar_unique",
      },
    },
    ConflictAction: &ast.ConflictActionDoNothing{
      Do:      85,
      Nothing: 88,
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
INSERT INTO foo (foo, bar) VALUES (1, 2) ON CONFLICT ON UNIQUE CONSTRAINT bar_unique DO NOTHING
